title: terraform apply panics with nil pointer dereference
body: On Terraform 1.6.4, running apply against an AWS module panics with a nil pointer in the AWS provider plugin. Stack trace below. Steps to reproduce attached.
label: bug

title: AWS S3 bucket destroy hangs forever
body: Calling terraform destroy on an S3 bucket with versioning enabled hangs indefinitely. Logs show the provider polling for completion but never receiving a response.
label: bug

title: Plan crashes when module has unset optional variable
body: If a child module declares an optional variable without a default, plan crashes instead of reporting a clear error message.
label: bug

title: terraform init fails with 'invalid provider hash'
body: Suddenly terraform init refuses to start, claiming the provider hash in the lock file is invalid. Clearing the .terraform directory does not help.
label: bug

title: Provider for newer Kubernetes versions
body: Please add support for Kubernetes 1.30 to the official kubernetes provider. The current version errors out on the new API.
label: feature

title: Support importing existing AWS resources by ARN
body: It would be helpful if terraform import accepted ARN directly instead of requiring the resource-specific ID format for AWS.
label: feature

title: Allow plan output in JSON to a file
body: terraform plan -out=plan.tfplan saves the binary format. Add -json-out=plan.json to save a human-readable JSON plan directly.
label: feature

title: Add native Helm release support to Kubernetes provider
body: Currently we use the separate helm provider. It would be nice if the kubernetes provider supported helm releases natively as a resource type.
label: feature

title: Document the new for_each on modules
body: The for_each meta-argument on modules was added in 0.13 but the registry documentation still only mentions count.
label: docs

title: Clarify state migration steps in 0.13 upgrade guide
body: The upgrade guide skips the part where you need to run terraform 0.13upgrade. Add a step-by-step example.
label: docs

title: Update docs: backend partial configuration example
body: The backend partial configuration example in the docs uses a deprecated argument. Please refresh.
label: docs

title: Typo in resource provisioner remote-exec docs
body: The example in remote-exec docs has a typo: 'inine' should be 'inline'.
label: docs

title: How to share state between two workspaces?
body: I have a network workspace and an apps workspace. How do I expose VPC IDs from the network workspace to apps? Is data.terraform_remote_state still the recommended way?
label: question

title: Recommended pattern for multi-account AWS deployments?
body: We have ~20 AWS accounts. Looking for the official pattern: one workspace per account, one repo per account, or one big config with assume_role per account?
label: question

title: Can I use count and for_each on the same resource?
body: The docs say count and for_each are mutually exclusive on a single resource, but I see examples online that mix them. Which is correct?
label: question

title: Best way to migrate from local backend to S3 backend?
body: I have ~300 resources in a local state file. What is the safest path to migrate to an S3 backend without downtime or duplicate resource creation?
label: question
